name: Andrea's Brunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter both sides of 16 slices of bread. Place 8 slices in a 8 x 10 inch pan that is 2 inches deep. Cover the bread with sharp cheese and a slice of ham on each piece. Top with the remaining 8 slices of bread.
2. Mix together all ingredients except melted butter and cornflakes. Pour over casserole and refrigerate overnight.
3. Before baking, mix the melted butter and cornflakes. Spread evenly over casserole. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
